forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: a080
+project: semantic-search
+title: 'search tasks: return slim_task_json projection (not full enriched JSON)'
+---
+## What
+The `search tasks` op (`crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/search.rs`) currently maps each ranked `Hit` back to the FULL enriched task JSON via `task_entity_to_rich_json`, then attaches `score`/`signals`. The "slim map-back" revision on card `bchrrpg` (01KTC9VVAW145DZ7626BCHRRPG) supersedes this: `search tasks` results must use the SAME slim projection as `list tasks` (`slim_task_json` / `TaskDetail::Slim`) — an allowlist projection that EXCLUDES description/comments/attachments — plus `score`/`signals`. The agent follows up with `get task` (always full) on the hit it cares about. This keeps AI tool-call payloads lean (heavy enriched JSON × up to top_k hits is a large token cost).
+
+## Why this is a follow-up
+Discovered during a double-check of the shipped search implementation. `bchrrpg` was implemented (and merged) before the slim revision was reconciled; the op returns the heavy enriched shape. The slim infra (`task_helpers::slim_task_json`, `task/shared.rs::TaskDetail::Slim` + `parse_detail`) already exists on main and is used by `list tasks`/`add`/`paste`.
+
+## Scope (RESPONSE shape only — do NOT touch corpus/ranking)
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/search.rs`:
+  - `build_docs_with_embeddings` (~line 229) records `task_entity_to_rich_json(entity)` into `enriched_by_id`. Switch the stored value to the slim projection (e.g. `slim_task_json(&task_entity_to_json(&entity))`, matching how `add.rs`/`paste.rs` do it), OR project at map-back time in `map_hits_to_response`.
+  - `map_hits_to_response` still attaches `score` + `signals` to each result object.
+  - The INTERNAL corpus/Doc build is unchanged: embedding text stays `task_embedding_text(title, description)` and the lexical Doc fields (title/description/tags) still come from the full entity. Only the surfaced RESPONSE objects become slim.
+- Reuse the existing `slim_task_json` helper — do NOT hand-roll the allowlist.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `search tasks` response objects are the slim projection (no `description`/`comments`/`attachments` keys), each carrying `score` + `signals`.
+- [ ] Internal ranking is unchanged (embedding text + lexical fields still built from the full entity); only the response shape changes.
+- [ ] A unit test asserts a `search tasks` response task has NO `description` key but DOES have `score` and `signals`.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -E 'test(search)'` green; the real-model e2e (`qwen_embedding_search_tasks_real_pipeline_e2e`) still passes (update its assertions if they read a now-absent field).
+
+## Workflow
+- Use /tdd — write the failing "no description key" assertion first, then switch the projection.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -19,20 +19,19 @@
 The `search tasks` op (`crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/search.rs`) currently maps each ranked `Hit` back to the FULL enriched task JSON via `task_entity_to_rich_json`, then attaches `score`/`signals`. The "slim map-back" revision on card `bchrrpg` (01KTC9VVAW145DZ7626BCHRRPG) supersedes this: `search tasks` results must use the SAME slim projection as `list tasks` (`slim_task_json` / `TaskDetail::Slim`) — an allowlist projection that EXCLUDES description/comments/attachments — plus `score`/`signals`. The agent follows up with `get task` (always full) on the hit it cares about. This keeps AI tool-call payloads lean (heavy enriched JSON × up to top_k hits is a large token cost).

 ## Why this is a follow-up
-Discovered during a double-check of the shipped search implementation. `bchrrpg` was implemented (and merged) before the slim revision was reconciled; the op returns the heavy enriched shape. The slim infra (`task_helpers::slim_task_json`, `task/shared.rs::TaskDetail::Slim` + `parse_detail`) already exists on main and is used by `list tasks`/`add`/`paste`.
+Discovered during a double-check of the shipped search implementation. `bchrrpg` was implemented (and merged) before the slim revision was reconciled; the op returned the heavy enriched shape. The slim infra (`task_helpers::slim_task_json`, `task/shared.rs::TaskDetail::Slim` + `parse_detail`) already exists on main and is used by `list tasks`/`add`/`paste`.

 ## Scope (RESPONSE shape only — do NOT touch corpus/ranking)
-- `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/search.rs`:
-  - `build_docs_with_embeddings` (~line 229) records `task_entity_to_rich_json(entity)` into `enriched_by_id`. Switch the stored value to the slim projection (e.g. `slim_task_json(&task_entity_to_json(&entity))`, matching how `add.rs`/`paste.rs` do it), OR project at map-back time in `map_hits_to_response`.
-  - `map_hits_to_response` still attaches `score` + `signals` to each result object.
-  - The INTERNAL corpus/Doc build is unchanged: embedding text stays `task_embedding_text(title, description)` and the lexical Doc fields (title/description/tags) still come from the full entity. Only the surfaced RESPONSE objects become slim.
-- Reuse the existing `slim_task_json` helper — do NOT hand-roll the allowlist.
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/task/search.rs`: switch the surfaced response objects to the slim projection, reusing the existing `slim_task_json` helper. Internal corpus/Doc build (embedding text, lexical fields) unchanged.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `search tasks` response objects are the slim projection (no `description`/`comments`/`attachments` keys), each carrying `score` + `signals`.
-- [ ] Internal ranking is unchanged (embedding text + lexical fields still built from the full entity); only the response shape changes.
-- [ ] A unit test asserts a `search tasks` response task has NO `description` key but DOES have `score` and `signals`.
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -E 'test(search)'` green; the real-model e2e (`qwen_embedding_search_tasks_real_pipeline_e2e`) still passes (update its assertions if they read a now-absent field).
+- [x] `search tasks` response objects are the slim projection (no `description`/`comments`/`attachments` keys), each carrying `score` + `signals`.
+- [x] Internal ranking is unchanged (embedding text + lexical fields still built from the full entity); only the response shape changes.
+- [x] A unit test asserts a `search tasks` response task has NO `description` key but DOES have `score` and `signals`.
+- [x] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -E 'test(search)'` green; the real-model e2e (`qwen_embedding_search_tasks_real_pipeline_e2e`) still passes.
+
+## Implementation
+Added `surfaced_task_json(entity) = slim_task_json(&task_entity_to_rich_json(entity))` (enrich-then-allowlist, so filter_tags/ready survive while description/comments/attachments are dropped). `build_docs_with_embeddings` records `surfaced_task_json` into `enriched_by_id` instead of `task_entity_to_rich_json`; `map_hits_to_response` still attaches `score`/`signals`. Internal `build_doc` + `task_embedding_text` untouched (full entity). Renamed the map-back test to `map_hits_to_response_shape_is_slim_with_score_and_signals` — adds descriptions and asserts `description`/`comments`/`attachments` are absent while `score`/`signals`/`ready`/`filter_tags` remain. The e2e never reads dropped fields (it only sets description on input), so no e2e change needed.

 ## Workflow
-- Use /tdd — write the failing "no description key" assertion first, then switch the projection.
\ No newline at end of file
+- Used /tdd — slim assertion first, then switched the projection.
\ No newline at end of file
